creator: bg1tpt@gmail.com
text:
The patch is approved. But it seems LATEST_LINK's value is the default
value. Can it be removed?

Thanks.

On Mon, 30 Jul 2007 16:50:14 UT, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of net/pear-SOAP,

> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
